notes: Active-station scaling: Target A + Target B ping-pong. Fixed 1s DATA interval + event-driven ACK. Run for 5 minutes regardless of packet count; record actual count. Watch for FIFO overflow (led[15] on Nexys A7).
description: C5b Active-Station Scaling -- 2 stations ping-pong, SF7, +14 dBm, 5-min run, Target A + Target B
